heroHeadline: Zelensky in Turkey for Diplomatic Talks as Russia-Ukraine Exchange Fatal Strikes
heroSubtitle: Russia launches combined missile and drone attacks on Day 1,500 of the full-scale invasion, killing at least 14 civilians; Zelensky condemns the 'Easter escalation' as a second strike wave kills at least 5 more; cumulative Russian personnel losses exceed 1,301,260 as Moscow continues high-tempo assaults across the front; peace process remains paused as US diplomatic focus stays on Iran conflict
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
